pages.text: &6Herbalism&r is the knowledge of what each leaf does. The same research that lets you weaponize a poison also lets you brew its antidote — and the antidote rarely grows where the poison does.

Forest yarrow cures mountain wolfsbane; swamp marshmallow root cures forest belladonna; jungle cinchona cures desert oleander. Each remedy is ground at the Mortar and Pestle and drunk to pull one specific poison out.
Because no single biome grows both a poison and its cure, you must trade, travel, or conquer to stay safe. Herbalism is as much a diplomacy system as a combat one.
